howItWorks.intro: Biorhythm theory proposes that three biological cycles begin at birth and oscillate in a predictable sine wave pattern throughout your life.
rules: The Physical cycle (23 days) governs strength, coordination, and stamina
The Emotional cycle (28 days) governs mood, sensitivity, and creativity
The Intellectual cycle (33 days) governs alertness, memory, and analytical thinking
howItWorks.outro: Each cycle is calculated as sin(2π × days_since_birth / cycle_length) × 100, giving a value from -100 to +100. Critical days occur when a cycle crosses zero, which some believe indicates instability in that area.

faq.question: What are biorhythms?
faq.answer: Biorhythms are a theory that three biological cycles start at birth and repeat in fixed periods: Physical (23 days), Emotional (28 days), and Intellectual (33 days). Each cycle oscillates between positive and negative phases.

faq.question: How are biorhythm values calculated?
faq.answer: Each cycle is calculated using the sine function: sin(2π × days_since_birth / cycle_length) × 100. This produces a value between -100 (lowest) and +100 (highest) for each cycle on any given day.

faq.question: What are critical days in biorhythms?
faq.answer: Critical days occur when a biorhythm cycle crosses the zero line, transitioning between positive and negative phases. Some practitioners believe these days bring instability or heightened risk in the corresponding area.

faq.question: What do positive and negative values mean?
faq.answer: Positive values (+1 to +100) indicate a high or favorable phase in that area, while negative values (-1 to -100) indicate a lower or recovery phase. Values near zero are considered transitional or critical.

faq.question: Is biorhythm theory scientifically proven?
faq.answer: Biorhythm theory has not been validated by mainstream scientific research. Multiple studies have failed to find statistically significant correlations between biorhythm cycles and real-world performance. It remains popular as a self-reflection and entertainment tool.

faq.question: How do I read the 30-day forecast?
faq.answer: The 30-day forecast shows each cycle's value for the next 30 days. Look for days where multiple cycles are high for potentially good days, or where cycles cross zero for critical days.

sections.title: What Is the Biorhythm Calculator?
sections.body: The Biorhythm Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your your birth date, target date, you get instant results including ❤️ physical, 💜 emotional, 💡 intellectual. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
